note: MOE-FULL-14 — official machine-readable MoE certification manifest. Embedded into the binary (include_str!) and used by the controlled production path to gate execution. Scopes: certified_fixture (numerically certified vs HF f64 on a tiny end-to-end fixture), certified_partial (a real-checkpoint single-layer MoE-block sub-reference is also certified), experimental, unsupported. Tiny fixtures only — this is NOT a large-model production certification.

families.real_checkpoint_partial: mixtral_layer0 (real Mixtral layer-0 MoE block, <1e-6 vs HF)
families.limitations: tiny fixtures only; no Mixtral-8x7B scale certification

families.real_checkpoint_partial: qwen2_moe_layer0 (real Qwen2-MoE layer-0 MoE block vs HF)
families.limitations: tiny fixtures only; norm_topk_prob=true + shared expert convention is auto-resolved from shared_expert_gate (use forward_with to pin)
synthetic tiny fixture only; full-forward drift f32-vs-f64 (MoE block dominated, argmax/greedy exact); no Q-LoRA, no YaRN-scaled RoPE
